A **residual** is the deviation
between an observed value
and its corresponding fitted value, $\hat y$:
$$
\ba
\resid(\hat y) &\eqdef y - \hat y
\ea
$$

For indexed observations,
this is equivalently:
$$
\resid_i \eqdef y_i - \hat y_i
$$

The fitted value $\hat y_i$ is often
a sample mean or fitted conditional mean,
but not always.
